calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances :
Atty. W. David Holsberry of McCracken, Stemerman & Holsberry LLP,
Tel. No. 1-415-597-7200 appearing for the Petitioner;
Atty. Steve Cikes of Sloan Sakai LLP, Tel. No. 1-415-678-3810 appearing for
the Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Bay Area Air Quality Management District Employees' Association's petition to compel arbitration and to consolidate separate arbitration proceedings is granted. Respondent Bay Area Quality Management District is required to arbitrate the two grievances. The two grievances are consolidated, although the arbitrator is authorized to sever them or make any other appropriate orders regarding phasing of the issues. The delegation clause in section 4.12.2 of the MOU is clear and unmistakable and requires that any disputes regarding arbitrability are to be decided by the arbitrator. The issue whether the aggrieved workers in the two grievances are "represented employees" is an issue about arbitrability, which is within the scope of the delegation clause. The two grievances arise from the same series of related transactions and involve common issues of law or fact and are thus consolidated per CCP 1281.3. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Continued To May-21-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
